block_02: We would like to inform you that January 20, 2020, Martin Luther King Day, is a public holiday in the United States. Several trading instruments will be affected on this day.
block_03: For your convenience, changes to the trading schedule are highlighted below. All times are in GMT.
block_18: Note: Binary and Digital Options markets will operate as usual. Depending on market conditions, Over the Counter (OTC) assets may become available for trading.
block_19: Note: The FX Options market will open as usual, but may close early depending on market conditions.
block_20: Should you have any questions, do not hesitate to get in touch with our Support team.
